case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. TRACY MITCHELL et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF VICTOR PATENAUDE RE: WAIVER OF INTEREST & ATTYS' FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-26-2003 CONTINUED TO FEB-20-2004 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MITCHELL, TRACY $1,411.84 PRINCIPAL, $180.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,592.14, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
